results.description: Baseline verification - found pandoc line-wrapping issue and module-not-found failures
results.notes: docx-create lost 10pts on content criterion due to pandoc wrapping 'March 2026' across lines

results.description: Added --wrap=none to pandoc commands, added npm install docx instruction
results.notes: Model installed docx but stopped without running the script (early termination)

results.description: Compressed docx-js.md from 350 to ~90 lines, streamlined SKILL.md, inlined complete docx-js working example with correct API patterns

changes: Compressed SKILL.md from ~200 lines to ~137 lines, removing verbose sections
Inlined complete docx-js working example directly in SKILL.md to prevent model from using non-existent API classes (BulletList, ListItem)
Added --wrap=none to ALL pandoc commands to prevent line wrapping that splits text across lines
Added explicit instruction to combine npm install + node execution in one command to prevent early termination
Added text extraction (pandoc) inside the docx creation script example using child_process.execSync
Compressed docx-js.md from ~350 lines to ~90 lines with only essential patterns
Added CRITICAL warning that docx package has no BulletList/ListItem classes
Emphasized using a single .js file for both creation and extraction to minimize tool calls
